description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency with JavaScript's notoriously complex native Date API, focusing on practical skills like date manipulation, formatting, and localization. Designed at an intermediate to advanced difficulty level, it challenges users to move beyond third-party libraries and master built-in functionality. The teaching tone is lighthearted and slightly sarcastic, using humor to make a traditionally frustrating topic more approachable while encouraging deeper technical understanding.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Native date manipulation, Date formatting, Localization, Third-party library alternatives
Audience: Intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers seeking to master native date handling without relying on external libraries
